meta.title: American stealth bombers strike Iran's nuclear facilities
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Two days ago, the United States Air Force carried out the largest stealth bomber air strike in history, with seven B-2 Spirits dropping 14 of the largest bunker-busting munitions ever built on two of Iran’s most heavily protected nuclear facilities, known as Fordow and Natanz.
